attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you complete the crafting table before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, after mining the oak log in Step 4, use it to craft the oak planks in Step 5, then immediately craft the crafting table in Step 6. This will allow you to use the crafting table to make a wooden pickaxe in Step 8, which is necessary for mining cobblestone and eventually iron ore. Additionally, make sure to craft sticks as soon as possible by using the oak planks from Step 5. This will prevent the repetitive failure loop you encountered.
